company.name: Mapengo Innovations
company.tagline: High-Performance Websites & Powerful Apps for South African Businesses

services.title: Web Development
services.description: High-performance websites and web applications built with modern frameworks — from landing pages to full-stack web apps.

services.title: Mobile App Development
services.description: Cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android, delivering seamless user-friendly experiences.

services.title: UI/UX Design
services.description: User-centred design that balances aesthetics with usability to create memorable digital experiences.

services.title: E-Commerce Solutions
services.description: Scalable online stores that convert visitors into customers, built for South African markets.

services.title: Systems Integration
services.description: Seamlessly connect your business tools, APIs, and third-party services for unified operations.

services.title: Cloud & Hosting
services.description: Scalable cloud infrastructure with managed hosting and DevOps support for your digital products.

services.title: Maintenance & Support
services.description: Proactive monitoring, updates, and support to keep your digital products running smoothly.

projects.title: ShopZA Platform
projects.description: A full-featured e-commerce platform serving thousands of monthly shoppers across South Africa.

projects.title: MedConnect App
projects.description: Telemedicine mobile app connecting patients with doctors in underserved communities.

projects.title: CityFlow Dashboard
projects.description: Analytics dashboard processing real-time data to help businesses make smarter decisions.

projects.title: TaxEase Portal
projects.description: Tax management platform automating compliance for small and medium businesses.

projects.title: Heritage Hotels Website
projects.description: Hospitality website with booking integration and immersive storytelling.

projects.title: AgriTrack System
projects.description: Farm management platform tracking crops, livestock, and supply chain from field to market.

testimonials.name: Sipho Ndlovu
testimonials.text: Mapengo Innovations transformed our online presence. The platform exceeded our expectations and drives real results.

testimonials.name: Dr. Amina Patel
testimonials.text: The MedConnect app has helped us reach patients in rural areas. Novice and his team understood our mission deeply.

testimonials.name: Lerato Dlamini
testimonials.text: Their technical expertise is world-class. The dashboard handles massive data effortlessly. Our go-to partner.

team.name: Novice Nhlovo Mathebula
team.bio: ALX-trained Software Engineer and founder of Mapengo Innovations. Passionate about making high-quality digital solutions accessible to every business.
